I ordered food from Domino’s through Swiggy and was disappointed with the delivery experience.The delivery executive handed over the order without any carry bag or proper outer packaging.The food items were being carried openly in his hands.I received the order at my shop in front of customers and other people, which felt embarrassing and unprofessional.Customers expect food to be delivered in a proper, hygienic, and presentable manner.This is not just about a missing carry bag but about service

I had placed an order at 7.00pm but they didn't deliver it till 8.20pm and then I cancelled it at 8.21pm. Now they have placed cancellation charges on me for cancelling my order. So it means I have to wait for the order to be delivered even if takes indefinite time and if cancelled then it's my problem. I even talk to customer support but they didn't gave satisfactory response and just said that if you cancel your order,you have to pay cancellation charge even if the restaurant delayed the order
